features.name: tranif1 driving tri wired signal
features.description: Code should include a tranif1 instance driving a tri wired signal with a control signal
features.snippet:
tri w1, w4;
tranif1 g2(w4, w1, address);

features.name: tranif1 strength battle with pull0 pull1
features.description: Code should include a tranif1 competing against pull0/pull1 strength signals on a tri wired net
features.snippet:
not (pull0, pull1) g3(w3,w4),g4(w4,w3);
tranif1 g2(w4, w1, address);

features.name: sram storage with tranif1 access and cross-coupled inverters
features.description: Code should include cross-coupled inverters with pull0/pull1 strength forming an SRAM storage element accessed via tranif1 and bufif1
